heading: Exception relating to importation of goods
label: 2335 Exception relating to importation of goods
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in subsec. (a), was in the original “this title”, meaning title LXXII of div. F of , known as the Fentanyl Sanctions Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 116–92section 2301 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The authorities and requirements to impose sanctions under this chapter shall not include the authority or a requirement to impose sanctions on the importation of goods.

children.heading: Good defined
children.label: b Good defined
children.text: In this section, the term “good” means any article, natural or manmade substance, material, supply, or manufactured product, including inspection and test equipment, and excluding technical data.
